docker_command:
HIBENCH_MISTRAL_VIBE_CONFIG=active_model = "gpt-5"
default_agent = "default"
enable_telemetry = false
enable_update_checks = false
enable_auto_update = false
enable_notifications = false
enable_connectors = false
vibe_code_enabled = false
narrator_enabled = false
voice_mode_enabled = false
enable_otel = false
api_timeout = 10

[experiments]
enable = false

[session_logging]
enabled = false

[[providers]]
name = "hibench"
api_base = "http://host.docker.internal:36455/v1"
api_key_env_var = "HIBENCH_MISTRAL_VIBE_API_KEY"
api_style = "openai"
backend = "generic"

[[models]]
name = "gpt-5"
provider = "hibench"
alias = "gpt-5"
temperature = 0.2
thinking = "off"
supports_images = false
